title: Entry attachments
description: Support file uploads to local storage instead of URL references only.

title: Documentation & QA revisit
description: Revisit all documentation for accuracy and perform manual QA across the system.

title: Multi-user support
description: Support multiple users with separate journal spaces and per-user API keys.

title: OAuth support
description: OAuth 2.1 with PKCE for MCP HTTP transport. Includes authorization server metadata (RFC 8414), dynamic client registration (RFC 7591), token refresh, and automatic cleanup.

title: Code refactor & stability
description: General refactor across all packages for better code quality, consistency, and stability.

title: Structured logging
description: Add structured logging with configurable log levels across the entire system.
